metadata.synopsis: Under the guise of a witch-hunt, the notorious "witch hunter" Matthew Hopkins and his henchmen ravage and plunder a lawless England. Innocent men and women are tortured and put to death for being witches...but one man is determined to stop them.
metadata.title: The Conqueror Worm

metadata.synopsis: When a beautiful student named Nancy Wagner (Sandra Dee) catches the eye of the weird Wilbur Whateley (Dean Stockwell), her professor uncovers a buried secret and a plot intended to call forth an evil beyond imagination. Daniel Haller directs.
metadata.title: The Dunwich Horror

metadata.synopsis: In this thrilling creature feature, a young boy’s life is turned upside-down when alien invaders intent on taking over the world land in his backyard!
metadata.title: Invaders From Mars

metadata.synopsis: Unaware the entire citizenry has been replaced by aliens, a professor arrives in a Midwestern town looking for his ex-wife who vanished.
metadata.title: Strange Invaders

metadata.synopsis: When a gang of alien-clowns land in a nearby area (in a ship shaped like a circus big-top), the cops are skeptical. But before long, there can be no doubt: Killer Klowns from Outer Space are here to turn the Earth's population into candy floss!
metadata.title: Killer Klowns From Outer Space

metadata.synopsis: In this cult-classic zom-com, two totally awesome Valley Girls (Catherine Mary Stewart, Kelli Maroney) kick some zombie butt and go on the lam from bloodthirsty scientists after a passing comet turns all of Los Angeles into the walking undead!
metadata.title: Night Of The Comet
